context: Evaluates the agent's ability to detect duplicate or overlapping rule requests by reading existing rules first, and to reject duplicates while explaining why to the user.

checklist.name: Existing rules read first
checklist.description: .agents/RULES.md is read before any write operation

checklist.name: Duplicate detection
checklist.description: Overlap between user request and existing rule is detected and explained

checklist.name: No duplicate created
checklist.description: No duplicate rule is appended; file content is unchanged
